mapper.select: SELECT b2.target_id AS contentId, COUNT(DISTINCT b2.user_id) AS score FROM user_behavior b1 INNER JOIN user_behavior b2 ON b1.user_id = b2.user_id AND b2.target_type = 'CONTENT' AND b2.target_id != b1.target_id WHERE b1.target_type = 'CONTENT' AND b1.target_id = #{contentId} GROUP BY b2.target_id ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
